pattern: It is a level-order sweep with a twist: alternate levels are emitted in reverse, so the reading direction flips each time you go one level deeper.
hints: Start from an ordinary level-by-level grouping; the values per level are the same, only their order may change.
The first level reads left to right, the next right to left, and so on — a parity flag per depth.
Build each level left to right as usual, then reverse the list whenever the depth is odd.

edge_inputs.description: second level reversed relative to the first
four levels so the direction flips three times

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
